meaning: adj.肿胀的,肿瘤性的,浮华的,浮夸的
examples: Tumorous vessels and tumor stain were also seen.
Use carrageenin to make white rats' toes tumorous.
In 4 families, other members suffered from benign thyroid tumor or non-tumorous thyroid disease.
Part of a family known as taxanes, paclitaxel is blunt chemotherapy that kills healthy cells alongside tumorous ones.
